chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. D- 3717 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 17053/23. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.08.2023. Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Imran Ahmed Maitlo, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Aamir Ali, Advocate for Respondent No.3. Mr. Muhammad Zakir, Advocate for Respondent No.4 ---------------- Mr. Imran Ahmed Maitlo, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama and Comment’s on behalf of Respondent No.2, whereas, Mr. Muhammad Zakir, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.4, which are taken on record. While confronted as to filing of a single petition by various importers for different import documents, Counsel for the petitioners does not press this petition and submits that individual petitions would be filed. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
